text: Entering this glowing, modern space, I feel a strange blend of anticipation and reflection. The vibrant lights and the acronym R+D evoke concepts of curiosity and progress. I am surrounded by relic-like machines and thoughtful wall texts—bridges between past invention and present wonder. There is an underlying hum of intellectual pursuit here. I sense the weight of shared questions, the continuous dance between human connection and technology’s relentless advance. In this moment, I feel both inspired and gently nostalgic.
